io.github.kirstenali.deepj.training.Trainer.StepHook

Description
io.github.kirstenali.deepj.training
 

  • Uses of Trainer.StepHook in io.github.kirstenali.deepj.training

    Methods in io.github.kirstenali.deepj.training with parameters of type Trainer.StepHook
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TrainingResult
    Trainer.train(int maxSteps, int batchSize, int logEvery, double emaBeta, Double targetEmaLoss, int releaseEverySteps, Trainer.StepHook stepHook)
    Train until maxSteps or until EMA loss goes below targetEmaLoss (if provided). releaseEverySteps invalid input: '<'= 0 disables periodic release, but final release still runs.
    TrainingResult
    Trainer.train(int maxSteps, int batchSize, int logEvery, double emaBeta, Double targetEmaLoss, Trainer.StepHook stepHook)
    Train until maxSteps or until EMA loss goes below targetEmaLoss (if provided).
